title: WIKITOT Wooden Tea Set for Toddlers, 21pcs Tea Party Set for Children, Birthday Gift Toys for 3+ Year Old Girls
features: 21 PCS Kids Tea Set Meet All the Requirements for Hosting Tea Party! Our wooden toys include 1 tray, 1 teapot, 1 plate,1 sugar cup, 2 cups/spoons/coasters, 6 types of biscuits (donut/cookie etc.), tea bag, coffee chip, lemon slicesbiscuit box, and order card. A wealth of toy kitchen accessories let your little girl can fully recreate real afternoon tea rituals and social interaction during family or friend playdates.

Premium Quality Wooden Materials Protect Your Kids Safe. Our kids tea sets for girls are made of natural wood with smooth, rounded edges and non-toxic water-based paint, safer more than plastic alternatives and better protects your child's delicate skin. You can rest assured to immerse your child in the role they play for hours.

Build Your Child's Skills & Spark Imagination Through Role Play Toys. Children use order cards to arrange hospitality, pour "tea" and share snacks, creating their own afternoon tea. Through role playing "host" and engaging in pretend play, children enhance table manners and social skills, while various Dim sum cookies stimulate their imaginative story telling - turning games into happy learning.

Practical And Beautiful Unicorn Toys Design. Play kitchen accessories features a beautiful design with soft colors and incorporates elements that children like, making it not only a toy but also a decorative item for a child's room. The tray is conveniently sized for easy storage of all accessories, helping your kids keep their play area tidy and organized.

Ideal Toys for 3+ Year Old Girls. Wooden kitchen toys will enhance kid's creativity and imagination, encourage communication. Whether for birthdays, holidays, or special occasions,the colorful and vibrant wooden tea party set will keep your little kids excited and keep busy for a pleasant day. Note: This tea set is for pretend tea parties – keep it dry for long-lasting fun!
